scripts.release:major:ngx-common: pnpm --filter @touhidrahman/ngx-common exec pnpm version major && pnpm build ngx-common && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major:ngx-simple-store: pnpm --filter @touhidrahman/ngx-simple-store exec pnpm version major && pnpm build ngx-simple-store && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor:ngx-common: pnpm --filter @touhidrahman/ngx-common exec pnpm version minor && pnpm build ngx-common && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor:ngx-simple-store: pnpm --filter @touhidrahman/ngx-simple-store exec pnpm version minor && pnpm build ngx-simple-store && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:patch:ngx-common: pnpm --filter @touhidrahman/ngx-common exec pnpm version patch && pnpm build ngx-common && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:patch:ngx-simple-store: pnpm --filter @touhidrahman/ngx-simple-store exec pnpm version patch && pnpm build ngx-simple-store && git push && git push --tags
